overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a San Francisco-style residential neighborhood at night. The character navigates intersections, sidewalks, and steep hills while passing vehicles and pedestrians, with a distinctive illuminated tower visible in the background throughout.

events.description: white sedan passes from right to left in front of the character
character steps from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the character

entered.detail: corner building with bay windows typical of San Francisco architecture
tall illuminated cylindrical tower visible on the hill in the distance
traffic signal pole at the intersection
white car driving through the intersection
white commercial van parked on the side street
multi-story residential building with ornate facade
tall street lamp illuminating the intersection with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a residential intersection at night, crossing the street while a white sedan passes by. Victorian houses line the corners, and the distinctive Coit Tower is visible in the distance. The character reaches the sidewalk as a white delivery van passes on the left.

events.description: character meets another pedestrian who begins walking alongside
companion pedestrian stops and remains behind while character continues

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk alongside another character who then stops

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside the ego before stopping on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tree growing on the sidewalk between parked cars
dark colored sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along the residential sidewalk, the character is joined by a companion NPC who walks alongside briefly before stopping. The street is lined with parked cars and street trees, while the Coit Tower remains visible ahead. The Victorian house facade continues along the right side.

events.description: pedestrian in red shirt walks past the character in the opposite direction
dark colored car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking in the opposite direction past the character

entered.detail: multi-story residential building across the street
silver sedan parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt walking the opposite way. Parked cars line the left side of the path, and apartment buildings are visible across the street. The Coit Tower remains a constant landmark in the distance as vehicles occasionally pass on the road.

events.description: character crosses the street as a brown SUV passes by
character begins ascending the steeply inclined street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and beginning to walk up the steep hill

notable_agents.action: brown SUV driving up the hill, passing the character

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings
steeply sloping road characteristic of San Francisco hills
retaining wall along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another intersection, navigating around a brown SUV, and begins ascending a steeply inclined street. The environment opens up with a stone retaining wall visible on the left side of the road. The Coit Tower appears closer as the character climbs the hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep hill approach to tower with trees

events.description: character passes a 2-hour parking sign on the left
street becomes darker as tree canopy covers more of the sky

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep hill toward the tower, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking down the hill in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall stone wall supporting the hillside on the left
green and white sign indicating 2-hour parking restrictions
dense trees lining the left side of the steep street

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the steep hill, now with a stone retaining wall on the left and dense trees providing partial cover overhead. A parking sign is visible on the left side of the road. The Coit Tower looms larger in the distance as the character approaches, and the street becomes darker under the tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential neighborhood at night that gradually transitions from flat intersections into a steep, tree-lined ascent toward a distant landmark. It begins at a street corner where the character crosses past Victorian houses and passing white vehicles, with the illuminated Coit Tower visible in the distance. As the character moves along the sidewalk, the scene shifts past parked cars and pedestrians, maintaining a steady path alongside residential facades and apartment buildings. The camera then navigates another intersection and begins to climb a steeply inclined street, where the environment opens up to reveal a stone retaining wall. Finally, the ascent continues under a darkening canopy of dense trees, with the Coit Tower looming larger and more prominent as the character climbs higher into the hill.
